overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, following various pedestrians past neon-lit buildings and under overpasses. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring wet reflective streets, futuristic architecture with prominent Arasaka branding, and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban street with neon signage and construction barriers

events.description: camera switches from following umbrella person to following shirtless man running across street
shirtless pedestrian runs across the wet road between vehicles

agents.ego_description: following pedestrians along the wet sidewalk, switching between different people including a person with umbrella and a running man

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk
shirtless man running across the wet street toward the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building with large red neon sign reading 'Fuyutsuki' in white letters
yellow and black striped concrete construction barriers with blue accents
glowing green digital pillar with scrolling text and advertisements
rain-slicked pavement reflecting neon lights and street lamps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, following a pedestrian with an umbrella along a wet sidewalk. The camera passes yellow construction barriers on the left and approaches the Fuyutsuki building with its prominent red neon signage on the right. The scene transitions to following a shirtless man running across the street between sparse traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone approaching underpass with large corporate billboard

events.description: entering covered area beneath the overpass structure
camera begins following woman in orange jacket and shorts walking ahead

agents.ego_description: following a woman in an orange jacket and denim shorts walking under the overpass, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: woman in orange jacket and denim shorts walking with black umbrella
red sports car driving past on the wet road alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive illuminated overhead billboard displaying 'ARASAKA' with holographic human figures
concrete overpass ceiling with embedded fluorescent lighting creating a canopy overhead
yellow and black striped metal barriers separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered area beneath an overpass, with the massive Arasaka billboard dominating the view ahead. The camera follows a woman in an orange jacket walking along the wet pavement, passing metal guardrails as the environment becomes more enclosed. The lighting shifts from open street lamps to the artificial glow of the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with red walls

events.description: entering darker section of underpass with red ambient lighting from the left wall
graffiti art becomes visible on the red tiled walls to the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass following the woman with umbrella, passing other pedestrians on both sides

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the wall
woman with umbrella and backpack walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: red tiled wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art illuminated by overhead lights
large cylindrical structural pillars supporting the overpass above
illuminated advertising banners hanging from the ceiling of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes fully enclosed within the underpass, with red tiled walls featuring graffiti appearing on the left. The camera continues following pedestrians through the dimly lit corridor, passing concrete support pillars and illuminated advertising banners overhead. The space feels more confined and urban, with scattered debris on the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep underpass with dense graffiti and gathered pedestrians

events.description: camera turns left to face the graffiti wall and slows down to observe the environment
camera passes close to pedestrians standing against the left wall, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: slowing down and turning to examine the graffiti art on the wall, passing by stationary pedestrians and a person in tactical gear

notable_agents.action: group of people standing against the graffiti wall, one person looking at their phone
person in tactical gear standing near the wall facing the camera

entered.detail: large colorful graffiti mural with blue and yellow abstract designs on the red wall
scattered trash, bottles, and objects littering the base of the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the underpass where the camera turns to focus on the detailed graffiti covering the red walls. Several pedestrians stand against the wall, some looking at phones, while the camera passes a person in tactical gear. The environment is dimly lit with scattered debris on the ground, emphasizing the gritty urban atmosphere of the cyberpunk setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy cyberpunk street that gradually descends into a gritty, enclosed urban underpass. It begins on a wet sidewalk following a pedestrian with an umbrella past yellow construction barriers and the red neon signage of the Fuyutsuki building, before shifting focus to a shirtless man running across the street. As the camera moves forward, the open street transitions into a semi-covered area beneath an overpass dominated by a massive Arasaka billboard, where the lighting shifts from street lamps to an artificial glow while following a woman in an orange jacket. The scene then narrows into a fully enclosed corridor with red tiled walls and concrete pillars, passing illuminated advertising banners and scattered debris on the ground. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the dim underpass, turning to focus on detailed graffiti and pedestrians leaning against the walls, including a figure in tactical gear.
